title: Tehran says 'nothing' finalised after Trump claims deal to end Iran war near
summary_full: Iran says reports of a deal are "speculative" after the US president says a "great settlement" to end the conflict has been reached.
summary_public: Iran says reports of a deal are "speculative" after the US president says a "great settlement" to end the conflict has been reached.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iran says reports of a deal are "speculative"
